purpose: Continue uncited n6-architecture corpus absorption — batch 3 (top 100). Batch-2 (atlas-absorb-uncited-batch-2-top-100, 96 paths absorbed) carried coverage 46.1%→49.5% (per witness numbers) / true covered-paths 23.4%→26.6%. This batch-3 continues into the next 100 uncited paths, dominated by domains/compute/{chip-design/hexa-*, chip-*, network-protocol/} + 4× domains/cognitive/hexa-speak/proto/ STUBs. Honesty-preserving: 49 gold-standard 855-1192 line .md template clones across compute/* rolled into a single META; 10 chip-design verifier ladder L3~L10 verify_*.hexa given individual @P entries with verbatim Korean assert-summary preservation; 5 STUB verifiers preserved verbatim in cluster; 12+5 network-protocol cert/per-protocol short-form clones rolled to META; 3 substantive Korean-comment hexa programs (xn6_asm_examples 305L / rtl_generator 472L / hexa_mouse 323L) given individual @P entries.

tooling.rationale: Top-100 ordering is alphabetic within domains/, deterministically excludes batch-1+batch-2 already-cited paths. Scanner re-run post-shard verifies sentinel + coverage delta.

rule: raw#8 hexa-only (no new .py/.sh/.rs/.toml created — only .n6 + .json this cycle)
raw#43 hard-implementation-default (concrete numbers from real source files)
raw#77 audit-append-only-ledger (shard is new file, atlas.n6 untouched)
own:atlas-absorb-mandatory (new shard tracked under absorption_completeness scanner)

scanner_diagnostic.coverage_pct_inheritance_note: batch-2 witness reported coverage_pct 46.1→49.5; this number was derived from cited_tokens/corpus (562/1219=46.1%, 692/1219=56.8% at end of batch-2 — but witness used pre-write count 562/1219=46.1% and a post-shard intermediate ratio 49.5%). For batch-3 witness, we adopt the rigorous covered_paths/corpus ratio (uncited-derived) to avoid ambiguity. covered_paths = corpus - uncited = files actually covered by some |> citation.

tier_1_implemented.rationale: Tier-1 deliverable: 10 individual @P entries for chip-design verify_chip-{3d-stack,photonic,wafer,superconducting,quantum-hybrid,topo-anyon,neuromorphic,photon-topo,dna-molecular}.hexa with full verbatim Korean closing-block preservation (per-ladder hypothesis count 42/48/54/60/66/72/78/78/84 + n=28 대조 실패 lines + Egyptian power split + sigma*J2=288 invariant); each verifier 191-292 lines of real .hexa assert code

Tier-1 honesty mechanism: 49 compute domain .md files (855-1192 lines each) share the gold-standard §1 WHY skeleton — claim individuation NOT supported by source; rolled up under one META entry (N6ARCH-COMPUTE-DOMAIN-GOLDSTD-CLUSTER) + parallel chip-design L3-L10 .md cluster (10 files, N6ARCH-CHIP-LADDER-MD-GOLDSTD-CLUSTER); refused to invent per-instance differentiation

Tier-1 honesty: hexa-speak proto STUB cluster (3× 11-line files preserving 'STUB: <name>.py (HEXA 포팅 대기)' with original .py line counts 178/338/238) + verifier STUB cluster (chip-hexa1/chip-sc/chip-wafer 10L STUBs + chip-pim/consciousness-chip 54L partial verifiers with explicit delegation-to-hexa-pim-domain framing) — 8 STUB files preserved verbatim, NOT promoted to verified status

Tier-1 honesty: HEXA-DNA L10 verifier source explicitly says '84/84 산술 검증 통과 (EXACT 78 + TIGHT 6)' — atlas grade [10*PARTIAL] not [10*]; the 6 TIGHT cases preserved as a distinct grade qualifier, NOT painted over

Tier-1 honesty: 12 cert files + 5 per-protocol mappings cluster registers per-protocol n=6 sigma=12 coverage geometry (the n6-architecture's own claim) but explicitly defers protocol speed/timing/PHY specs to external standards bodies (PCI-SIG / IEEE 802.3 / VESA / etc.) — atlas does NOT re-assert standards-body authority
